messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0033",
  "title": "头部超级产品缺位致使新品整体收入大幅缩水",
  "page_index": 11,
  "page_range": "11"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0034",
    "title": "2023年",
    "page_range": "11",
    "summary": "Answers questions about 2023 annual performance and new product rankings. Contains the date (2023), a quantitative metric (15.3% proportion/share), and a ranked list of five specific entities (逆水寒, 崩坏：星穹铁道, 晶核, 冒险岛：枫之传说, 合金弹头：觉醒). The evidence type is a structured metric and ranked list, suitable for retrieving annual share data and top new release titles for that year."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0035",
    "title": "2024年",
    "page_range": "11",
    "summary": "This section provides 2024-specific data, enabling retrieval of answers regarding annual metrics and product rankings. It contains a single quantitative metric (18.9% proportion) and a ranked list of the top 5 new products for the year. It can answer questions about the exact percentage value for 2024, the identity and sequential ranking of the top new releases (1. 地下城与勇士：起源, 2. 无尽冬日, 3. 恋与深空, 4. 三国：谋定天下, 5. 向僵尸开炮), and whether specific entities appear in the 2024 top 5. The evidence type consists of a direct percentage metric and a numbered list; no definitions, procedures, tables, figures, or additional contextual claims are present."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0036",
    "title": "2025年",
    "page_range": "11-1",
    "summary": "This section provides retrieval-ready data for the year 2025, answering questions about:\n- **Topics & Dates:** Annual market proportion and top new product releases for 2025.\n- **Metrics:** 1.5% (the specific proportion/share for 2025).\n- **Entities:** The top 5 new products of 2025: 燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 无畏契约：源能行动, 杖剑传说, 永远的蔚蓝星球.\n- **Figures:** A pie chart illustrating yearly proportions (blue segment for the target year, white for the remainder) paired with a visual ranked list of the top 5 new products, designed to enable cross-year comparison of market performance and new releases.\n- **Evidence Types:** Data visualization and ranked list sourced from independent research by 点点数据 (Diandian Data).\n- **Definitions/Procedures/Claims:** None explicitly provided; the section is strictly data presentation and chart layout description."
  }
]

message.content: This section examines annual market performance and top new product releases from 2023 to 2025, addressing how the absence of top-tier super products caused a significant decline in overall new product revenue. It provides year-specific quantitative metrics and ranked lists of the top five new releases: 2023 (15.3% market share; 逆水寒, 崩坏：星穹铁道, 晶核, 冒险岛：枫之传说, 合金弹头：觉醒), 2024 (18.9% market share; 地下城与勇士：起源, 无尽冬日, 恋与深空, 三国：谋定天下, 向僵尸开炮), and 2025 (1.5% market share; 燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 无畏契约：源能行动, 杖剑传说, 永远的蔚蓝星球). The 2025 data includes a pie chart visualizing yearly market proportions alongside a visual ranked list, sourced from independent research by 点点数据 (Diandian Data). Evidence types consist of structured percentage metrics, numbered/ranked lists, and data visualizations, enabling precise retrieval of annual share values, top new release titles, and cross-year performance comparisons. No definitions, procedures, tables, or additional contextual claims are provided.
